info.name: Workday Integration Workday Financial Management API

description.content:
API for financial accounting, expense management, revenue management, and financial reporting. Enables programmatic access to general ledger, accounts payable, accounts receivable, and budgeting functions.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday API Support
 Email: api-support@workday.com
